Prostate-Specific Antigen (PSA) Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/prostate-specific-antigen-psa-test/ 
Prostate-Specific Antigen (PSA) Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a prostate-specific antigen (PSA) test? 
A prostate-specific antigen (PSA) test is a blood test that measures the level of PSA in a sample of your blood. PSA is a protein made by your prostate. The prostate is a gland in the male reproductive system. It lies just below the bladder. It makes the fluid
